seoTitle: Bawley Point vs Bayview — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Bawley Point and Bayview. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Bawley Point vs Bayview: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bawley Point and Bayview.
heading: Bawley Point vs Bayview — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bawley Point, New South Wales and Bayview, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bayview has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Bawley Point (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bawley Point or Bayview safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bawley Point has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Bayview scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bawley Point scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Bayview scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bawley Point or Bayview?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bayview has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
